name: Paycor
description: Paycor’s Talent Management streamlines reviews, tracks goals, and offers AI-powered insights with automated workflows. Learn more about Paycor

reviews.review_title: Paycor - Simplified System A Must Have
reviews.review_description: Paycor has more than enough to offer. One App. that can make life so much easier with these features: * Payroll * Benefits * Expense Management * Scheduling * Background Screening * Talent / Work Management * Point of Sales * And so much more. . An ability to have all the above qualities, if not most or all companies require - this overall experience is a blessing. Thank you Paycor for simplifying HR responsibilities. Well Done...🤗
reviews.review_pros: It's compacted so much into one system. Not login in several apps to get everything done. Time saver for sure!
reviews.review_cons: I am yet to discover a dislike with Paycor..

reviews.review_description: Overall, Paycor has solved many issues we have had in the past and now we are working with our team to ensure full use of the all the tools has available to assist them in making Payroll, Scheduling, Recruiting and Employee Management easier on the day to day.
reviews.review_pros: It has made corrected many of the time clock and scheduling issues we have had in the past that negatively effected our payroll thus saving time and money. The customer support team and tools available have been awesome and the app is easy for our employees to use for requesting time off, availability, direct deposit and seeing their employee file and work related documents.
reviews.review_cons: Limitation on reporting and some industry specific scheduling parameters are an issue as well as the current disconnect between the recruiting platform and the actual software, but the Paycor teams have informed us updates are coming and some of the things we need are on those updates.

reviews.review_description: I liked it. Was a very middle of the road system. Good not bad does what you need it to do. Cost efficient.
reviews.review_pros: I used it as our main recruiting system at my old job, but it was fairly easy to use. Def user friendly.
reviews.review_cons: Its been a few years, but at the time customer service wasnt the greatest. It may have improved since then

reviews.review_description: Overall, our experience with Paycor has been mixed. While it meets basic HR needs at a lower price point, it lacks the strategic tools, reporting depth, and innovation necessary to support a growing or forward-thinking organization.
reviews.review_pros: Paycor offers a fairly affordable HRIS option for small to mid-sized companies. You get a decent amount of features for the cost, including payroll, onboarding, and basic analytics, making it a budget-friendly system.
reviews.review_cons: The platform lacks innovation and feels outdated compared to competitors. Support response times can be inconsistent, and product updates often lag behind industry standards. You often get the sense they are playing catch-up.

reviews.review_description: After working with Paycor for the past four years, I truly love the system and know it like the back of my hand. I often praise the platform and credit it as a key contributor to my success in my role.
reviews.review_pros: I always say you’re only as good as your tools, and I see Paycor as one of the key tools that allows me to perform my role effectively while maintaining a healthy work-life balance.
reviews.review_cons: If I had to note a drawback, it would be that we are currently on a legacy version of the system. I would love the opportunity to upgrade, though I understand this is a company-level decision and not a limitation of the platform itself.

reviews.review_title: Improving but still needs a lot of work.
reviews.review_description: It has been okay but there is still a long ways to go. Some of the simplest things are not available still like password requirements or document signings and it is such a roundabout way to get something done.
reviews.review_pros: I like the ease of use and how everything is centralized and together in one place. I think for the cost, we are also getting a lot more than the other provider we were with.
reviews.review_cons: The customer service isn't the best and it is incredibly frustrating working with some of the success managers. They are not there to help, they are just there to "buy" more time, or they just completely ghost us.

reviews.review_title: Streamlined, Reliable, and Easy to Use – Paycor Delivers!
reviews.review_description: Overall, our experience with Paycor has been very positive. The platform is easy to navigate, and it has significantly streamlined our HR and payroll processes. Implementation was well-supported, and the ongoing customer service is responsive and helpful. While there are areas for improvement—particularly in reporting flexibility—the system continues to evolve and meet the needs of our growing team.
reviews.review_pros: Paycor’s platform is intuitive and user-friendly, which makes managing payroll, benefits, and performance reviews much more efficient. I especially appreciate how seamlessly the different modules integrate, reducing manual work and improving accuracy across the board.
reviews.review_cons: Some areas of the platform, like reporting and analytics, could be more customizable and easier to navigate. Occasionally, system updates or changes aren’t well-communicated in advance, which can lead to confusion or extra troubleshooting.

reviews.review_description: Over it has been a good experience, Paycor provides the majority of our needs. There are updates that seem half baked and take a bit more time before it truly works for our teams.
reviews.review_pros: The ease of onboarding from Paycor Recruiting and transferring data from the candidates application as well as processing offer letters through DocuSign.
reviews.review_cons: The number of clicks it takes to complete a simple task and the random changes in the names of different drop downs. It becomes confusing and a learning curve each time

reviews.review_description: Overall, we were mostly pleased with Paycor, however, when there was no accountability after several errors, we decided to move to a new payroll vendor.
reviews.review_pros: Paycor was user-friendly and intuitive. It made processing payroll easy. Employees also enjoyed Paycor because of its ease of use.
reviews.review_cons: When there were errors or omissions in payroll, customer service was little to no help at all. We had missing contributions to our retirement vendor and Paycor never notified us.

reviews.review_title: Paycor Applicant Tracking, Payroll, and Scheduling
reviews.review_description: Decent overall experience. There are areas of improvements to be had, but overall they are better than our legacy vendor Paycors
reviews.review_pros: Great user UX, Simple to use from a user perspective once a system is setup, Robust approvals and control systems. We use it for recruitment, onboarding, timekeeping, and payroll.
reviews.review_cons: Onboarding was rough. Their team is stretched thin. Their support is inadequately trained. They provide inaccurate information, or don't know and you often times need to be escalated to level 2 support.

reviews.review_description: My experience with Paycor since becoming a consumer at the beginning of 2025 has not been very pleasant. Client support has not been very helpful, most my open cases have to be escalated to the next support level. It usually takes at least a week to resolve an issue. Sometime the issue is no resolvable.
reviews.review_pros: The self service features and the workflow. It put the responsibility on the employee and HR doesn’t have to contact the employee for missing information.
reviews.review_cons: The time clocks and customer support. Issue is hardly resolved the same day. I usually have to send pictures and video of my issues

reviews.review_description: System overall works fine but if we do run into an issue, customer service us not easy to work with and has limited knowledge of their own product.
reviews.review_pros: I would say the pros of Paycor include the value for money and also the ease of use. Compared to other systems, cost was reasonable for product provided.
reviews.review_cons: The biggest concern would be customer service. If there is an issue it is difficult to get a knowledgeable rep to assist you.

reviews.review_description: I’m still learning the system- but over all I’m neutral on Paycor as a whole. From time keeping to labor reporting - from recruitment to onboarding - it would be nice to have very clear procedures from Paycor to follow
reviews.review_pros: Employee management from start to finish. Seeing the lifecycle of a person from candidate to employee.
reviews.review_cons: Lack of clarity on how to optimize the system. Training tools are not super helpful and report generation is a slough. A definition / glossary module would be nice.

reviews.review_description: It’s been okay, I would recommend to new companies just starting out. It’s affordable and gets the basic needs done.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use, sales person was responsive, it’s a good system for basic needs and everything is together- our benefits, talent and core
reviews.review_cons: Customer service lacked knowledge and not a ton of customization, needs ability to be more customer friendly

reviews.review_description: Mostly positive. Easy to use but some of the platforms they integrate with don’t work well. But the basics of hiring and doing payroll are really easy to use and save a lot of time.
reviews.review_pros: Look and ease of use and the mobile app gives our employees easy access to pay stubs, t time off, timesheet approval and company news.
reviews.review_cons: Benefit enrollment and reporting features could be improved upon. BSwift is a robust benefit platform but there are always errors in our enrollment each year that we have to correct throughout the year.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy working with paycor and the support. I also really like the paycor webinars that are given each quarter.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate all the feedback we give as customers that are implemented. I also appreciate all the customer support we receive.
reviews.review_cons: The document library was supposed to be enchanced, but i think its more difficult to use. We have advised on this issue.

reviews.review_description: Overall, we have had a great experience. We had some tricky requests and needs and Paycor worked with us to get everything set up the way we needed it.
reviews.review_pros: I like the relationship with our sales rep and his dedication to making sure we are getting everything we need and are happy with our service.
reviews.review_cons: The timing on escalated service requests take longer than I would like. It can take up to 2r hours to get a response and sometimes it is more emergent than a 24 hour response.

reviews.review_description: Generally positive, first level customer support could improve but this is true of most HCM software I’m familiar with!
reviews.review_pros: It is a very comprehensive product for the price point.
reviews.review_cons: Access permissions and custom security roles (outside of default Paycor roles) are overly complex and comprehensive training is not available on this area.

reviews.review_description: Paycor offers a one stop shop for all thing payroll and HR related. Platforms that handle not only payroll, recruiting, onboarding, benefits, but taxes and compliance as well.
reviews.review_pros: The ease of the BA Platform. Makes it easy to stay ahead of payroll, new hires, changes and / or terminations, benefits and compliance.
reviews.review_cons: Leave tracking could be more intuitive, syncing with payroll to determine eligibility with automated reminder to follow up on necessary documents that include the Manager.

reviews.review_description: self taught, no support. you rely on customer to take all of the lessons and watch all webinars and charge for proper training. what good is buying a system if you dont get the training to use it correctly...
reviews.review_pros: clocking in and out is easy, requesting time off easy. employees like the app. like expense management and storing all documents electronically
reviews.review_cons: customer support. tickets take forever, support are hard to understand. often when they help they fix one thing and it breaks another. need more tax help

reviews.review_description: Over, Paycor gets the job done. However, modernizing there system will bring greater benefits to our company.
reviews.review_pros: Setup - simple to navigate on own and find what you are looking for. Therefore, it has easy to get on your own.
reviews.review_cons: Customer support - sometimes Paycor representatives are difficult to work to and figuring out the department to best assist you take 10+ minutes a

reviews.review_description: Overall experience was ok. With the uniqueness of our organization we require alot of data that needs to be stored as well as our extensive employee policy manual which the Paycor site had trouble storing the way we preferred
reviews.review_pros: Paycor's time and attendance system was fairly easy to use and their time & attendance team was easy to work with and were helpful in resolving any issues that arrived.
reviews.review_cons: There were limitations as to how much scannable data & forms can be stored on their system for employees and on the main page.

reviews.review_title: Paycor: turning payday into a maybe-day
reviews.review_description: We had a lot of struggles with Paycor. We were told it would do everything we needed to do but a lot of things needed to be done manually in an excel sheet to calculate the correct Blended OT, SOH, ect.
reviews.review_pros: It would show us how many hours needed to be worked each week to qualify for benefits for the following year.
reviews.review_cons: The system could not find or calculate spread of Hours. Incompetent tax team. Constant adjustments with tax issues.

reviews.review_description: I have had an amazing experience with Paycor and use it weekly. it has truly helped me keep track of my own payroll for my business
reviews.review_pros: I love how it has all tools necessary to be able to keep track of payroll and employee hours. it is very easy to navigate as well.
reviews.review_cons: nothing. Paycor has really helped me with my payroll and attendance for employees. it helps keep track of everything HR related.

reviews.review_pros: Paycor is very user friendly. Our favorite feature is the applicant tracking system. Recruiting and onboarding is simple and makes our process very efficient.
reviews.review_cons: I wish there was a direct number to reach someone when an issue or question arises. You have to email your inquiry to their customer support; however, they respond fairly quickly.
